title: vateria oblongifolia
intro: Vateria oblongifolia, also known as the Indian rosewood, is a large evergreen tree native to the Western Ghats of India. The bark of this tree is rich in medicinal properties, containing compounds like vateria lignan, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Vateria oblongifolia include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against cell damage. Vateria oblongifolia is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, to create remedies for colds, coughs, and other respiratory ailments, as well as to treat wounds and skin conditions.
